description: Health dashboard with Recovery tab, weight tracker hero screen, sub-tab navigation, and rule-based insights.

userStories.title: Add weight goal to WeightStore
userStories.description: As a user, I want to set a weight goal so I can track my progress toward it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add goalKg: number | null and setGoal(kg: number | null) to WeightStore state
Persist goalKg in the AsyncStorage partition alongside unit
Add derived selectors: distanceToGoal, isOnTrack (7-day trend heading toward goal)
Run post-task-code-review skill on all changed files

userStories.title: Install Victory Native and Skia
userStories.description: As a developer, I need charting libraries installed for the weight bar chart and recovery sparklines.
acceptanceCriteria: Add @shopify/react-native-skia and victory-native via npx expo install
Run post-task-code-review skill on changed files

userStories.title: Create WeightGoalSheet component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a bottom sheet to set my weight goal.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/WeightGoalSheet.tsx with Modal, number input, Save/Cancel

userStories.title: Create WeightBarChart component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a gradient bar chart showing weight history with a goal line.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows last 14 days as vertical bars with gradient fill
Horizontal dashed goal line when goal is set

userStories.title: Create full-screen WeightHero screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want a bold full-screen weight view with hero number, goal distance, and bar chart.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/weight.tsx as Stack screen route
Dark background, hero weight, goal distance, bar chart, FAB add button

userStories.title: Create daily_health_snapshots migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Supabase table for daily health metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Create supabase migration with proper schema

userStories.title: Add DailyHealthSnapshot Zod schema and types

acceptanceCriteria: Add Zod schema to validators.ts, export type from models.ts

userStories.title: Add resting heart rate fetch to HealthKit
userStories.description: As a developer, I need resting HR from HealthKit for recovery calculation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add mock value for demo mode

userStories.title: Create recovery score algorithm
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pure function to compute recovery score.

userStories.title: Create rule-based insights engine
userStories.description: As a user, I want daily insight messages based on my health metrics.

userStories.title: Create RecoveryStore
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Zustand store for health snapshots and recovery scores.
acceptanceCriteria: Derived selectors for baselines, recovery score, trend

userStories.title: Create RecoveryTab component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Recovery sub-tab showing score, insight, and statistics.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses RecoveryGauge with real data, summary card, stat rows

userStories.title: Refactor Home with SummaryTabs navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want health-focused sub-tabs on the Home screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Mount SummaryTabs in index.tsx with tab switching
Overview shows existing content, Recovery shows RecoveryTab

userStories.title: Add weight widget and rings to Overview
userStories.description: As a user, I want weight summary, progress rings, and daily insight on Overview.

userStories.title: Add recovery sparkline mini-charts
userStories.description: As a user, I want 7-day trend sparklines next to recovery statistics.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/RecoveryStatRow.tsx with Victory Native sparkline

userStories.title: Final integration test and cleanup
